name: Exile's Corruption
author: Echosight
description: Dark corruption theme inspired by PoE's corruption mechanics with deep purples and red accents

primary.family: Segoe UI, Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif

container.background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(25, 0, 25, var(--user-transparency, 0.15)) 0%, rgba(35, 0, 35, calc(var(--user-transparency, 0.15) * 1.2)) 50%, rgba(25, 0, 25, var(--user-transparency, 0.15)) 100%)
